documentation.description:
Streamed from drone to report progress of terrain map download (initiated
by TERRAIN_REQUEST), or sent as a response to a TERRAIN_CHECK request. See
terrain protocol docs: https://mavlink.io/en/services/terrain.html

record_types.name: Terrain_Report

fields.name: Spacing
fields.description: grid spacing (zero if terrain at this location unavailable)

fields.name: Current_Height
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Current vehicle height above lat/lon terrain height

fields.name: Pending
fields.description:
Number of 4x4 terrain blocks waiting to be received or read from
disk

fields.name: Loaded
fields.description: Number of 4x4 terrain blocks in memory

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid
Returns True if CRC is valid

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC
